note: Training roadmap for MERLIN LoRA models. Models trained on Triade mechanics are marked OBSOLETE.

merlin-full-v9.obsolete_reason: Trained on Triade mechanics (180 references to Triade/aspects/Corps/Ame/Monde) — must retrain after faction system implementation

narrator-v1.obsolete_reason: Trained on Triade mechanics (49 references to Triade/aspects) — must retrain after faction system implementation

gamemaster-v1.obsolete_reason: Trained on Triade mechanics (300 references to Triade/aspects/Corps/Ame/Monde) — must retrain after faction system implementation

worker-v1.note: No Triade references found in training data — safe to use

retrain_plan.blocker: Faction system must be fully implemented in game design and code before retraining
steps: 1. Regenerate training JSONL with faction-based mechanics (no Triade/aspects)
2. Retrain narrator LoRA (highest Triade contamination after gamemaster)
3. Retrain gamemaster LoRA (300 Triade references — most contaminated)
4. Retrain full model on clean v10 dataset
5. Validate outputs contain no Triade/aspect references

archived_datasets.note: Older datasets also contain Triade references — do NOT use for retraining
